creator: wac@google.com
text:
Created attachment 175720
Patch Makefile and distinfo for 0.15.0.

Update dulwich to current version 0.15.0, released 2016-10-09.

Release information at: https://pypi.python.org/pypi/dulwich/0.15.0

Included patch updates Makefile and distinfo. Existing patch files in this port applied cleanly to 0.15.0.
